summary: Excellent soundboard recording of a tight 1980 show highlighted by a monster Feel Like A Stranger and a solid He's Gone.
review: The three reviewers rave about the band's chemistry, especially the interplay between Brent and Jerry on Feel Like A Stranger, calling the performance tight, long and meaty. Recording quality is praised as crystal‑clear with an excellent mix that lets every instrument shine, making this a very listenable capture of the era.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviews are positive (4–5 stars) and highlight both strong musical performance and high‑quality soundboard audio, giving a combined impression of an outstanding show with excellent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note a very clear mix, great sound quality and the ability to hear all instruments distinctly throughout the set.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall tight and engaging performance with strong band interplay; no major pacing or song‑selection issues mentioned.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Big, meaty tone throughout; praised for awesome guitar work and seamless interaction with Brent.
band_member_comments.Keys: Interplay between Brent (keys) and Jerry highlighted as a highlight of the show.
